title: Dri Aire Medium Hi Grade Dehumidifier Complete With 2 × 500g Refill Bags For Fast, Power-Free Moisture Absorption And Damp Protection In Small Enclosed Spaces
features: High-Capacity Absorption: The DRI AIRE Medium Hi Grade uses two 500g refill bags to absorb moisture quickly and effectively, helping prevent damp, mould and condensation while offering up to 1 litre total absorption for simple, reliable protection in everyday living spaces.

Power-Free Convenience: Designed to work without electricity, this model provides silent, continuous moisture control, making it ideal for areas with limited power access while keeping the environment fresher and reducing unwanted humidity throughout the home or workplace.

Reusable, Long-Lasting Design: The DRI AIRE Medium Hi Grade features easy-to-replace refill bags, allowing repeated use and long-term value. Its refillable nature ensures simple maintenance while delivering consistent performance in managing excess moisture.

Ideal For Compact Spaces: Perfect for wardrobes, cupboards, caravans, garages and areas prone to window condensation, this unit is tailored for low-ventilation environments where moisture easily builds up, helping protect fabrics, furnishings and stored items.

Sleek And Discreet Styling: Designed to blend seamlessly with home décor, the DRI AIRE Medium Hi Grade comes in Cream and Grey Mist, offering a modern, unobtrusive look that fits neatly into small spaces while providing dependable moisture-control benefits.
description: The DRI AIRE Medium Hi Grade dehumidifier offers high-capacity, power-free moisture absorption using two 500g refill bags. It helps prevent damp, mould and condensation in compact areas and low-ventilation spaces. Refillable, reusable and discreetly styled, it delivers an easy, reliable solution for daily humidity control.
